product.name: Hampton-Bay Tustna 26 in. 3-Light Brushed Nickel Bathroom Vanity Light with Opal Glass Shades (915)
product.description: Transform your bathroom with this elegant Hampton-Bay Tustna vanity light fixture. Featuring three oval-shaped opal glass shades mounted on decorative bars with a sophisticated brushed nickel finish, this 26-inch light bar delivers both style and functionality. The clean, geometric lines and transitional design make it a perfect fit for modern or contemporary bathrooms. The opal glass shades provide optimal illumination for daily grooming tasks while adding a soft, welcoming ambiance. Measuring 25.62 inches wide and 8.78 inches high, this fixture offers ample lighting coverage above your vanity mirror. The brushed nickel finish resists tarnishing and complements most bathroom hardware and fixtures. This vanity light combines practical illumination with refined aesthetics, making it an excellent choice for your bathroom upgrade.
features: MODERN TRANSITIONAL DESIGN: Features 3 opal glass shades with decorative bars in a brushed nickel finish, creating clean lines that complement both modern and transitional bathroom decor
DIMENSIONS: Measures 25.62 inches wide by 8.78 inches high, providing ample lighting coverage for bathroom vanities and ideal for makeup application or shaving tasks
THREE-LIGHT CONFIGURATION: Equipped with 3 light sources housed in oval-shaped opal glass shades that provide even, functional illumination for daily grooming routines
BRUSHED NICKEL FINISH: Elegant brushed nickel metalwork enhances the fixture's contemporary aesthetic while resisting fingerprints and maintaining its appearance over time
EASY DIY UPGRADE: Simple installation process makes this vanity light bar an effective way to refresh and update your bathroom's appearance without major renovation
